description_long: This is a classic Chesterfield-style sofa upholstered in dark brown leather, featuring deep button tufting across the backrest and inner armrests. The sofa has a robust, rectangular form with high, rolled armrests that are level with the backrest, creating a continuous, enveloping silhouette. The seat consists of two large, flat cushions, while the back and arms are adorned with diamond-patterned tufting and matching leather-covered buttons. The legs are short, rounded, and dark, positioned at each corner for stability. Decorative nailhead trim runs along the front of the armrests and base, adding a touch of traditional elegance. The overall appearance is luxurious and inviting, suitable for upscale urban interiors or stylish public spaces.
description: A dark brown, leather Chesterfield sofa with deep button tufting, rolled armrests, and decorative nailhead trim. It features two large seat cushions and a continuous, enveloping backrest.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two seat cushions, deep button-tufted backrest, and rolled armrests with nailhead trim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rolled armrest, tufted detailing, and the sofa's substantial depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back and the continuous height of the backrest and armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the rolled armrest and tufted details, emphasizing the sofa's symmetrical design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, flat seat cushions and a single continuous, deeply tufted backrest; all cushions appear attached and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: High, rolled armrests that are level with the backrest, fully upholstered in leather with deep button tufting and decorative nailhead trim along the front edge.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, rounded legs positioned at each corner, dark in color, likely wooden, and slightly recessed for a subtle appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with a straight top edge, fully upholstered and deeply button-tufted in a diamond pattern.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown leather with a prominent diamond-patterned, deep button tufting across the backrest and armrests, and smooth seat cushions.
